title: Outdoor
description: Spend eight nights away from home. Cook a meal on camp. Tread new ground. It's time to find your feet in the great outdoors.

tips.title: Each young person who participates in the Programme, including badges and awards, should face a similar degree of challenge.
tips.details:
Requirements can be adapted according to each young person's abilities.

For more information and practical tips see our guidance on [flexibility](/volunteers/inclusion-and-diversity/supporting-those-with-additional-needs-and-neurodiversity/reasonable-adjustments/?cat=377,293&moduleID=10).
